notes: The platformer player bindings (R-SYS-007 / L-45). Action/context ids are L-33 stable intra-file ids (the id form is enforced inside a project dir; the standalone samples/input-bindings/ few-shot uses semantic ids). Human mapping: e8112cc9ea062172 = move_x (run axis, keys A/D), a2bf29db816e5b80 = jump (Space / gamepad south button), 7c26f13c5d642bb5 = ui_menu (Escape); context a8d87ef64cc30231 = gameplay, bd690d74260afb9b = the modal pause menu that CAPTURES input while open. The routing front-end (src/packages/input/) feeds the mapped actions into the sim InputState (move_x -> the move channel, jump -> the button channel); the runtime mirror in src/tests/integration/games/ installs these same contexts and scripts/movement.ts authors the same control response in TypeScript.
